findings.duplicate_source_warning: src/ccdf/model_raw.py duplicates historical DFlash logic but is not imported by the live runner; refactor must remove or quarantine it before changing generation semantics.
findings.model_lifecycle: Tokenizer and target load once per process; draft loads once for DFlash conditions; models are released on process exit.
findings.prompt_rendering: Dataset prompt plus protected policy suffix is rendered before compression; the target tokenizer applies the chat template once for precompression accounting and once for generation.
findings.serialization: Per-prompt JSONL flush plus fsync protects progress but adds result-writing overhead outside t_e2e_ms.
findings.single_prompt_compatibility: run_mvp accepts smoke, fixture, and dataset prompt sources through the same condition dispatcher.
